name: aberdeen-1995-oracle-interoffice
title: Oracle InterOffice: Helping IS Deploy Solutions to Business Partners and Customers Over the Internet
description: Frictionless Data Package archiving Aberdeen Group's December 1995 product profile of Oracle InterOffice (code-named Pegasus), a modular cross-platform messaging, document management, and workflow product announced December 13, 1995. Includes structured entities, technologies, observations, and controlled-vocabulary codes extracted from the original study.

sources.title: Oracle InterOffice: Helping IS Deploy Solutions to Business Partners and Customers Over the Internet (Aberdeen Group, December 13, 1995)

resources.name: studies
resources.title: Studies
resources.description: One row per research study ingested into the archive. This package contains a single study.

fields.name: study_id
fields.description: Unique slug identifier for the study

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Canonical or archived URL of the original study

fields.name: page_count
fields.description: Number of pages in original document

fields.name: contact_name
fields.description: Aberdeen contact named in the document

fields.name: contact_email
fields.description: Aberdeen contact email named in the document

resources.name: entities
resources.title: Entities
resources.description: Organizations, vendors, and institutional actors referenced in the study, with current (2026) status.

fields.name: role
fields.description: Role code in this study (see codes.csv scheme=entity_role)

fields.name: status_at_study
fields.description: Status at time of study (see codes.csv scheme=entity_status)

fields.name: status_note
fields.description: Narrative explanation of current status including acquisition history

fields.name: hq_location
fields.description: Headquarters location at time of study

fields.name: url_at_study
fields.description: Website URL at time of study (if known)

resources.name: technologies
resources.title: Technologies
resources.description: Software products, platforms, standards, and technology categories referenced in the study, with lifecycle status.

fields.name: vendor
fields.description: Vendor name at time of study

fields.name: version_at_study
fields.description: Version or release known at time of study

fields.name: successor
fields.description: Named successor product or technology (if applicable)

resources.name: observations
resources.title: Observations
resources.description: Structured analytical observations extracted from the study text, each mapped to a subject, dimension, and value.

fields.name: subject
fields.description: Primary subject of the observation (product, company, or concept)

fields.name: dimension
fields.description: The specific aspect or attribute being observed

fields.name: value_text
fields.description: Textual value or paraphrase of the observation

fields.name: value_numeric
fields.description: Numeric value if present (stored as string to allow empty)

fields.name: unit
fields.description: Unit for value_numeric (e.g., USD, platform-count, months)

fields.name: source_section
fields.description: Section heading in the original document

fields.name: page_ref
fields.description: Page number(s) in the original document

resources.name: codes
resources.title: Controlled Vocabulary Codes
resources.description: Controlled vocabulary for all coded fields used across the data package resources.

fields.name: scheme
fields.description: Name of the coding scheme / field it applies to

fields.name: code
fields.description: The code value as used in data files
